ZIP Code Patient's ZIP code. CHAR 11 x x x x x x x
M0063_MEDICARE_NA (M0063) No Medicare Number Patient has no Medicare number. 0 = Not Checked (Not NA - No Medicare), 1 = Checked (NA - No Medicare) CHAR 1 x x x x x x x
M0065_MEDICAID_NA (M0065) No Medicaid Number Patient has no Medicaid number. 0 = Not Checked (Not NA - No Medicaid), 1 = Checked (NA - No Medicaid) CHAR 1 x x x x x x
